name: story-composer-01
title: Story Composer 01
author: ilinxa
description: Instagram-canonical story creation surface — camera-first capture (photo + video + text-only), gallery pick, multi-layer Konva editor (image / drawing / stickers / text / ui-transformer), 6 edit tools (Text / Draw with eraser / Stickers with 36 built-in emoji + extensible / Filters with 10 Instagram-style presets and pre-rendered thumbs / Adjust brightness/contrast/saturation/blur / opt-in Crop with 9:16/1:1/4:5 — default omitted since stories are 9:16-locked), pan + pinch-zoom (1×–4×, touch + mouse-wheel + keyboard), video record (long-press hold OR tap-to-toggle shutter + auto-stop + two-handle trim + overlays baked into final video via canvas.captureStream + MediaRecorder), publish via XHR POST FormData with progress + uploader escape hatch for signed-URL flows, undo/redo on every overlay command, permission-denied auto-retry, discard-confirm guard. Third (and final) component of the story-system trilogy alongside story-rail-01 and story-viewer-01.
